scripts.setup: bun install && cd backend && bun install && cd ../frontend && bun install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,cyan -k "cd backend && bun run dev" "cd frontend && bun run dev"
scripts.start: bun run build && cd backend && STATIC_DIR=../frontend/dist DATA_DIR=./data bun --env-file=../.env run src/index.ts
